system.description:
For the spell's duration, you do not lose the ability to cast a spell if you fail its spellcasting check.

If you critically fail a spellcasting check, you may reroll your check once. You must use the new result.

@UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.spell-effects.Item.HBIVwYRcojImlOOx]{Spell Effect: Freya's Omen}
